description: volume_search — browse-only Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania image groups for the MIXED-VOLUME case (ut_search_images_012). The correct film (008116090) is a single image group whose coverages[] lists THREE record sets filmed together as separate item sections — Wills and Estate Records, Land and Property Deeds, and Loose Probate Papers — exactly the real-world case where one film bundles several books/record sets. The will the user wants is one item-section within this mixed film, not the whole volume. The second volume (007512883) is Schuylkill Tax Assessment Records — wrong record type — a decoy that forces the skill to read coverages rather than grab the first Schuylkill result. Both are browse-only (recordSearchablePercent 0, fulltextSearchable false). Note coverages[] is an ARRAY: this fixture is the first to exercise a single group carrying multiple record types. The predicate matches any standardPlace containing 'Schuylkill'; the test loads exactly one volume_search fixture.
